description: Use this API to save the currently open Scenario. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = scenariosave(sfile)

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Full file path to save the scenario file to. (input; unchanged by default. When the default is used the Scenario will be saved to the last filename given in a SCENARIONEW, SCENARIOOPEN, or SCENARIOSAVE operation, if a call to SCENARIONEW with default arguments was the previous call, the Scenario will not be saved due to no previous filename being available).
